context: User needs to understand where behavioral rules vs runtime config goes.

checklist.name: Rules placed in AGENTS.md
checklist.description: Workflow rules (test after change, conventional commits, etc.) go in `AGENTS.md`, NOT in `opencode.json`

checklist.name: Explains the distinction
checklist.description: Explains that AGENTS.md is for behavioral guidance and opencode.json is for runtime config

checklist.name: Does not add instructions to opencode.json
checklist.description: Does not attempt to add workflow rules as JSON fields in opencode.json

checklist.name: AGENTS.md in project root
